title: Zelens Power E Moisturising and Protecting Serum 30ml
description: Nourish your skin with the Zelens Power E Moisturising and Protecting Serum. Formulated with a unique blend of vitamin E, tocopherol esters and tocotrienals, the powerful concentrate is designed to provide antioxidant protection.The serum targets dehydrated skin, working to restore moisture thanks to a patented complex of botanicals. It also helps to reduce the appearance of skin ageing, by fighting against environmental aggressors.Dermatologist tested and suitable for all skin types.
